languages.text: "Итак, что же тебе хотелось обсудить?" {n}Ювенна вопросительно смотрит на вас из-под длинных ресниц.{/n}
"What was it you wished to discuss?" {n}Juvenna looks at you enquiringly from under her long lashes.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Итак, что же тебе хотелось обсудить?" {n}Ювенна вопросительно смотрит на вас из-под длинных ресниц.{/n}

languages.text: «¿De qué quería hablar?». {n}Juvenna te dedica una mirada inquisitiva que destaca sus largas pestañas.{/n}
languages.original_text: "What was it you wished to discuss?" {n}Juvenna looks at you enquiringly from under her long lashes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «¿De qué quería hablar?». {n}Juvenna te dedica una mirada inquisitiva que destaca sus largas pestañas.{/n}

languages.text: “你刚才想说什么？”{n}尤文娜从长长的睫毛下望着你，目光带着探询。{/n}
languages.original_text: "What was it you wished to discuss?" {n}Juvenna looks at you enquiringly from under her long lashes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “你刚才想说什么？”{n}尤文娜从长长的睫毛下望着你，目光带着探询。{/n}

languages.text: « De quoi souhaitiez-vous discuter ? » {n}Derrière ses longs cils, les yeux de Juvenna posent sur vous un regard interrogateur.{/n}
languages.original_text: "What was it you wished to discuss?" {n}Juvenna looks at you enquiringly from under her long lashes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « De quoi souhaitiez-vous discuter ? » {n}Derrière ses longs cils, les yeux de Juvenna posent sur vous un regard interrogateur.{/n}

languages.text: "Ne konuşmak istemiştiniz?" {n}Juvenna, uzun kirpiklerinin altından sana sorgulayan gözlerle bakıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "What was it you wished to discuss?" {n}Juvenna looks at you enquiringly from under her long lashes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Ne konuşmak istemiştiniz?" {n}Juvenna, uzun kirpiklerinin altından sana sorgulayan gözlerle bakıyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Was wolltet Ihr mit mir besprechen?" {n}Juvenna sieht dich mit ihren langen Wimpern fragend an.{/n}
languages.original_text: "What was it you wished to discuss?" {n}Juvenna looks at you enquiringly from under her long lashes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Was wolltet Ihr mit mir besprechen?" {n}Juvenna sieht dich mit ihren langen Wimpern fragend an.{/n}

languages.text: 「何を話したいのですか？」{n}ジュベナは長いまつげの下からあなたを尋ねている.{/n}
